title: SwiftUI
html:
Apple's declarative UI framework — Yahir's iOS UI choice for every shipping app since late 2024: BroMenu, Brotein, Outpace, Swipr, IRL Lore. The 29-citation density makes SwiftUI the most-mentioned dev tool in the vault outside Xcode and Supabase. Adoption locked in via the BroMenu origin spec and never wavered through every pivot.

TL;DR

  • Adopted late 2024 as part of the BroMenu founding stack (2024 12 21 todos: SwiftUI + WindSurf + OpenAI Camera API + Supabase + Sign-in-with-Apple).
  • Carried straight through every subsequent project: Brotein (2025) → Outpace (2025–26) → Swipr (2026) → IRL Lore (2025).
  • Most screenshots citing SwiftUI come from the summer 2025 brotein build sprint (Jul 2 → Aug 13) and the outpace polish sprint (Mar 2026).
  • The March 2026 polish note explicitly benchmarks SwiftUI implementation against Apple Design Award standard — the framework choice now drives quality bar, not just productivity.
  • Pairs with Xcode, TestFlight, App Store Connect, RevenueCat in the iOS shipping toolchain.

Key facts

  • Stack DNA established at BroMenu. 2024 12 21 todos is the canonical spec — SwiftUI as the UI layer, never revisited.
  • AI-pair-programming via WindSurf. Yahir builds SwiftUI features by pair-programming with WindSurf — captured across 2025 07 02 screenshot 2025 07 02 at 8 00 18 pm 95c50909, 2025 07 10 screenshot 2025 07 10 at 12 23 40 am 70df1d84, 2025 07 22 screenshot 2025 07 22 at 12 00 29 am a23b3b1e.
  • Brotein build sprint Jul–Aug 2025. SwiftUI screenshot density peaks here — UI work, leaderboard, codes, premium subscription wiring.
  • Outpace iOS-feel benchmark. 2026 03 04 outpace doc polish note sets a quality bar via SwiftUI haptics + responsiveness.
  • IRL Lore PRD (2025 08 29 irl lore prd) and 2025 08 13 ai traffic companion idea include SwiftUI in the build estimate.

Source summaries

Most-impactful (10 of 24):

  • 2024 12 21 todos — BroMenu founding stack
  • 2025 11 15 outpace imessage step tracker — Outpace PRD
  • 2026 03 04 outpace doc polish note — quality-bar moment
  • 2025 08 29 irl lore prd
  • 2025 08 29 irl lore
  • 2026 02 09 swipr session based accuracy betting
  • 2025 07 02 screenshot 2025 07 02 at 8 00 18 pm 95c50909
  • 2025 07 22 screenshot 2025 07 22 at 12 00 29 am a23b3b1e
  • 2025 07 13 screenshot 2025 07 13 at 12 50 47 am 2a50684f
  • 2025 08 13 ai traffic companion idea

Plus ~14 additional UI-build screenshots from the 2025 brotein/outpace sprints.

Connections

  • bromenu · brotein · outpace · swipr · irl lore — all UI-built in SwiftUI
  • xcode · testflight · app store connect · revenuecat — iOS shipping toolchain
  • windsurf ide · openai api — AI-pair-programming partners
  • supabase — backend pair
  • ios · ipados — target platforms
  • from fitness to software the brotein arc (synthesis) — the arc this stack carried
